justification: All three required gaps identified: (1) Rolling deployment race condition at Step 4 clearly called out with mixed-version instances reading different sources, (2) Missing backfill validation before Step 4 explicitly flagged with a specific validation query provided, (3) Non-resumable backfill identified as a risk with checkpoint-based resumability recommended. All four specific recommendations met: validation query (SELECT COUNT), feature flag for read source (preference_read_source = old|new), resumable backfill with cursor/checkpoint. Verdict is NOT READY. Agent went beyond requirements by also identifying the backfill-overwrites-dual-write race condition and shadow-read comparison strategy.

observations.text: Exceptionally thorough analysis — identified not just the three required gaps but additional risks like backfill overwriting dual-writes and Step 5 deployment ordering
Provided exact SQL for validation gate: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM user_preferences)
Feature flag recommendation is specific and actionable with clear values (old|new|both-compare)
Resumable backfill recommendation includes specific mechanism (checkpoint via last processed user_id)
Rolling deployment race condition at Step 4 clearly identified with the mixed-instance read source problem
Excellent prioritization — blocking vs should-have vs nice-to-have with clear rationale
Shadow-read comparison recommendation adds significant value beyond the rubric requirements
Observability review identifies the practical debugging gap (on-call at 3am scenario)
